name: setup_dev_environment
description: Create project scaffold, init venv/container, and install base dependencies.

name: dependency_scan
description: Run dependency/security scanner over a codebase.

name: run_vulnerability_scan
description: Run network/vulnerability scan inside an isolated lab (requires lab auth).

name: create_remediation_patch
description: Generate a remediation patch or PR for a known vulnerability.

name: run_port_scan
description: Perform a port scan against a target host or network segment  ONLY with authorization and in isolated lab environments.

name: spawn_agent
description: Create and start an orchestration agent instance with supplied role and capabilities.

name: spawn_subagent
description: Spawn a short-lived sub-agent to perform a bounded task and return results to the parent agent.

name: analyze_logs
description: Analyze collected logs for suspicious patterns and summarize findings.

name: monitor_logs
description: Start continuous log monitoring with alerting rules (read-only unless authorized).

name: generate_forensics_playbook
description: Produce a forensics playbook for a detected incident with step-by-step actions.

name: create_incident_response_runbook
description: Generate a runnable incident response runbook with commands and play steps.

name: rotate_secrets
description: Rotate credentials or secrets via secret-store APIs. Requires secure vault permissions and audit.

name: deploy_application
description: Deploy an application artifact to a target environment (staging/production) using approved pipelines.

name: monitor_performance
description: Collect and summarize performance metrics for services over a time window.

name: generate_architecture_diagram
description: Produce a system architecture diagram (textual or mermaid) from code / infra descriptions.

name: create_bug_bounty_scope
description: Draft an authorized bug bounty program scope and disclosure guidelines for a product or service.

name: generate_supplemental_docs_for_audit
description: Produce documentation artifacts required for compliance audits (evidence mapping, config snapshots, control descriptions).

name: create_access_token_policy
description: Draft a policy for short-lived access tokens, lifetimes, scopes, and rotation rules.

name: generate_privilege_escalation_hunt
description: Create detection rules and hunt playbooks for common privilege escalation patterns.

name: create_privacy_data_map
description: Map personal data flows across systems and produce retention and minimization recommendations.

name: generate_backup_strategy
description: Design a backup and restore strategy including retention, encryption, and recovery objectives.

name: create_malware_analysis_lab
description: Design an isolated analysis lab environment with VM/container specs, network isolation, and tooling lists.

name: generate_malicious_sample_handling_policy
description: Draft safe handling and storage policies for potentially malicious samples, including chain-of-custody and retention.

name: create_privileged_account_onboarding
description: Produce an onboarding checklist and required controls for privileged accounts.

name: generate_compliance_gap_analysis
description: Compare current controls to a target compliance standard and produce prioritized remediation items.

name: create_change_management_plan
description: Create a change management plan with approval flows, rollback criteria, and communication steps.

name: generate_runbook_for_operation
description: Produce an operational runbook with step-by-step commands, diagnostics, and recovery procedures for routine operations.
